<content>1: {
2:   pkgs ? import <nixpkgs> { },
3: }:
4: pkgs.mkShell {
5:   NIX_CONFIG = "extra-experimental-features = nix-command flakes ca-derivations";
6:   nativeBuildInputs = with pkgs; [
7:     nix
8:     home-manager
9:     git
10:     sops
11:     ssh-to-age
12:     gnupg
13:     age
14:   ];
15:   packages = [
16:     (pkgs.python3.withPackages (
17:       python-pkgs: with python-pkgs; [
18:         pydbus
19:         dbus-python
20:         pygobject3
21:         # gbulb
22:         dbus-python
23:         # python312Packages.pydbus
24:         # python312Packages.pygobject3
25:       ]
26:     ))
27:   ]
28:   ++ [
29:     # dbus-python
30:     # pygobject3
31:     pkgs.gobject-introspection
32:     pkgs.glib
33:   ];
34:   shellHook = ''
35:     # Save devshell PATH, then source HM session vars (EDITOR, etc.)
36:     _devshell_path="$PATH"
37:     unset __HM_SESS_VARS_SOURCED
38:     . "$HOME/.profile"
39:     # .profile prepends HM sessionPath entries to PATH — move devshell paths back to front
40:     # so devshell takes priority, with HM paths (e.g. ~/.local/bin) as fallback
41:     _hm_prefix="''${PATH%:$_devshell_path}"
42:     if [ "$_hm_prefix" != "$PATH" ]; then
43:       export PATH="$_devshell_path:$_hm_prefix"
44:     fi
45:     unset _devshell_path _hm_prefix
46: 
47:     echo "Welcome to the development shell!"
48:   '';
49: }
